home.heroSubtitle: LATAM Director at Six Seconds. Creator of ROWI. Pioneer of Emotional Budgeting. Emotions are data — and data transforms decisions.
home.heroRole: Regional Network Director LATAM · Six Seconds | Creator of ROWI | Emotional Budgeting
home.conceptText: Organizations manage money, processes, technology. But they rarely manage emotions. That's the space where I work: at the intersection between what we feel, what we decide, and the systems we build.
home.pillarEmotionsDesc: Measure, understand, and manage the emotional information that guides every human decision.
home.pillarDecisionsDesc: Transform emotional data into more conscious decisions, both individual and organizational.
home.pillarSystemsDesc: Design organizations where technology, emotions, and data work together.
home.quoteText: Emotions are not the problem. The problem is not knowing what to do with them.
home.newsletterDescription: Reflections on emotions, decisions, and human systems. Ideas from the intersection of emotional intelligence, technology, and conscious leadership.
home.newsletterSuccess: Thanks for subscribing! You'll hear from us soon.
home.newsletterError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
home.principle: Organizations have learned to manage money, processes, and technology. But they are still learning to manage something fundamental: emotions.

about.title: About
about.introText: I explore the intersection between emotions, decisions, and human systems. My work connects emotional intelligence, technology, and leadership to transform how people and organizations understand the emotions behind every decision. I am currently Regional Director for Latin America at Six Seconds.
about.storyP1: My story began in law. I worked on legal proceedings linked to the first civil reparations case between Peru and the United States, defending the rights of Peruvian families. That experience helped me understand how formal justice systems work, but it also left me with a deep question: Why are human decisions so influenced by emotions we almost never understand?
about.storyP2: After that chapter came photography. Photography completely changed the way I see the world. It taught me that reality depends on the angle from which you observe it. The same situation can have multiple interpretations depending on perspective.
about.storyP3: Later I worked in marketing, communications, and business management, holding leadership roles in different organizations. I also launched my own business ventures: some worked, others failed. But each experience brought me closer to understanding how human decisions work within complex systems. In 2013, I began my formal training in Ontological Coaching at Newfield Network.
about.storyP4: That search led me to Six Seconds, where I found the scientific foundation I had been looking for: a model that connects neuroscience, emotional intelligence, and human performance. Since then, I have accompanied thousands of professionals and young people in personal development and leadership processes across Latin America.

timeline.t1Role: Author of Redemption + Development of ROWIIA + Regional Network Director LATAM
timeline.t1Desc: Publication of Redemption. Development of ROWIIA ecosystem with AI. Proposal of the Emotional Budgeting model. Leading the emotional intelligence strategy for the entire LATAM region.
timeline.t2Desc: Application to record emotions, identify patterns, and improve personal decision-making.
timeline.t3Desc: Recognition as EQ Ambassador in the global emotional intelligence network.
timeline.t4Desc: Systems lab, technology, digital platforms, AI, automation, and analytics.
timeline.t5Desc: Formal training in Ontological Coaching, foundation for integrating emotions and human systems.

about.visionText: I believe in a world where organizations don't just manage results. But understand the emotions that produce those results. A world where technology amplifies our capacity to be more human, not less.
about.nobleGoalText: To support people in achieving their transformation through my own transformation.
about.approachText: I don't separate the emotional from the rational, nor technology from the human. My work integrates emotional science (Six Seconds, KCG model), technological innovation (ROWI, AI), and organizational systems design. The result: solutions that connect what we feel with what we build.

whatIDo.title: What I Do
whatIDo.subtitle: Four pillars connecting emotions, decisions, technology, and human systems.
whatIDo.pillar1Desc: As LATAM Director at Six Seconds, I work with the KCG model (Know Yourself, Choose Yourself, Give Yourself) to develop emotionally intelligent leaders. I implement emotional measurement with certified tools, design leadership development programs, and transform organizational cultures.
whatIDo.pillar1Tags: Six Seconds, KCG Model, Emotional measurement, Leadership, EQ Certifications
whatIDo.pillar2Desc: A proprietary organizational model that proposes managing emotions the way financial resources are managed. We measure and optimize five key emotional resources: energy, attention, trust, commitment, and burnout. Because what isn't measured, isn't managed.
whatIDo.pillar3Desc: ROWI is the app for recording emotions, discovering patterns, and improving decisions. ROWIIA is the AI-powered ecosystem connecting emotional data with advanced analytics. Together they form a platform that translates emotions into actionable information.
whatIDo.pillar3Tags: ROWI App, ROWIIA, Artificial Intelligence, Emotional patterns, Analytics
whatIDo.pillar4Desc: From Cactus Creative Community, we build digital platforms, AI solutions, automation, and analytics for organizations. The lab where ideas become systems that work — combining technology with human understanding.
whatIDo.pillar4Tags: Cactus Lab, Digital platforms, AI, Automation, Analytics
whatIDo.ctaTitle: Want to explore how to integrate these pillars into your organization?
